results.description: Verify dynamic spec import was removed and canonical module import is used.
results.command: spec_count=$(rg -n "importlib.util.spec_from_file_location" scripts/projections/run_pep_projections.py | wc -l); module_count=$(rg -n "importlib.import_module\\(\"scripts\\.pipeline\\.02_run_projections\"\\)" scripts/projections/run_pep_projections.py | wc -l); echo "IMPORTLIB_SPEC_COUNT=$spec_count"; echo "PIPELINE_MODULE_IMPORT_COUNT=$module_count"; if [ "$spec_count" -eq 0 ] && [ "$module_count" -ge 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
